hotel_name: Khách sạn Trà My - Trung tâm Sài Gòn (Trà My Hotel-Saigon Central)

reviews.title: DO NOT STAY HERE
reviews.text:
Customer service was terrible, refused full refund even though our room had black mold and smelt like cigarettes. Agoda also will not refund us even though we left our first night and didn’t even stay because we felt unsafe in the conditions.

The lady at the front desk only offered us one night refund, and could only offer us a different room the following morning. She was rude and not sympathetic about the situation.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.text: On the day of arrival they told me my room isn't ready and tried sending me to a different hotel

reviews.title: Scam hotel
reviews.text: Goat head to sell dog meat. I booked 2 nights and paid in full. When I arrived, they said there were no rooms and pushed me to another place with the receptionist's indifferent attitude. At first, they said the room was being repaired and I could stay somewhere else for a day, then they said there were no rooms available and wouldn't let me go back. Any guests who book should avoid this hotel.

reviews.title: When I paid and arrived at the hotel, they said there was no room available.
reviews.text: If there are no rooms available at the hotel, they shouldn't accept guests, but they took my reservation (I think they sold it to someone else for a higher price because it was the weekend). When I arrived, they told me there were no rooms. The customer service staff in Vietnam even got irritated with me. Agoda will fail if they treat customers like this.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.text: Never get there

reviews.title: I booked this hotel, but when I arrived, they directed me to another hotel.
reviews.text: I made a reservation here, and when I arrived, the receptionist told me that my room had a broken floor with water damage, so it smelled bad. I asked for another room, and was told there were no rooms available, and they sent me to a nearby hotel about 7 minutes away by motorbike. I was very tired from traveling a long distance, so I didn’t argue anymore and followed their directions to this new hotel, which was in very poor condition. The toilet leaked water all night, the air conditioning was broken, there were mosquitoes in the room, and the fan only blew in one direction. I was truly at a loss for words. So is it normal for guests to be sent to another hotel like this? I have traveled to many places, and this is the first time I have encountered such a situation.

reviews.title: The room is not as in the picture.
reviews.text: I arrived at the place and was given a room that didn't look like the photos, dark and damp. Then the hotel moved me to another hotel 4km away. The room was just as bad, and it was late, so I just gave up.

reviews.title: 1 night staycation
reviews.text: Hotel is extremly disappointed, old, small, dirty, looklike they have not cleaned for ages!

reviews.title: A bang for a buck
reviews.text: If you need something cheap close to the city centre that’s a place to go. But don’t expect much. It’s gross and moldy with dirty bedsheets. Bathroom is a totally different story. And a bad one. Not quite sure about the bedbugs yet, but plenty of ants. Safe travels everyone

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.text: The room is too small, stuffy, and everything is deteriorating; it's not worth the price. I won't come back a second time.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.text: The room is too small and cramped, everything is in decline, and considering the price, it's not reasonable. I won't come back again.

reviews.title: No parking now.
reviews.text: Just before the time, they reported that there were no more rooms available, and I had to change to another location, so the customer had no choice but to not stay anymore. Lost money for nothing.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.text: Stayed there one night before flying out. I'm quite sure that bedsheets wasnt fresh. Staff was friendly.

reviews.title: Tra My Hotel
reviews.text:
- Hotel in the Central Area is easy to get around 
- However, parking for cars is limited 
- I don't know about the room at Tra My Minh because I was switched to Kim Dung hotel due to lack of parking. The room at Kim Dung is generally normal, clean enough.

reviews.title: Good
reviews.text: The place is ok nothing special. However the bed sheet, pillow is dirty and seemed like not washing at all between guests.

reviews.title: Good
reviews.text: It is ok. Nothing special. A little dirty somewhat. The bed sheet is not clean and seemed like not washing at all.

reviews.title: Watch the end of your bed to avoid bleeding... The floor was worn out so bad.
reviews.text:
The floor was very worn out.  The design of the bed was not safe for you to walk as it was very easy to hit the corner of the end of the bed.  The end of the bed had a side poked out.  My child and I had hit this part some time and we got bleeded.

The good thing:  When I requested for toilet papers, water, and cleaning the room, the services were fast.  The reps were helpful with seniors.

reviews.title: Polite and helpful staff.
reviews.text: The reception staff was polite and helpful. I arrived late at night and was told the aircon wasn't working but I was offered a transfer to their branch hotel, which wasn't terrible for one night.

reviews.title: It’s sufficient
reviews.text: It does the job. Convenient, affordable, and accessible to all the restaurants in the area. The premise is fairly worn out the vinyl flooring need upgraded, it looks like the owner milking it without wanting to spend the money for renovation or improvement.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text: For the price, you can't get better. the accomodation is convenient and the location is very good.

reviews.title: Stay overnight at the hotel.
reviews.text: The room has no hot water, the water is too cold to bathe, the door lock is hard to open and needs to be replaced with a key card, and the wifi is weak.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text:
I spent over ten days here solo, great location, staff are so helpful and nice. Rooms are a clean and I left my things in the room everyday with no issues at all 

There’s a laundrette over the road 
Coffee shop a few yards away 
Food is everywhere

I honestly thought it was great!

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text: My room  had a small window looking in to the inside of the building .wery dark didn't know if it's day or night same price like any other hotels .a bit run down.  It's cleaned when you asked the stuff . Reception wery friendly helpful it's close to the newer walk or a huge park and a market .I was able to leave my lagage  which is helpful when you can check in at 2pm .lots of food around the moody place excellent they let me take some of my fruit and add in to the mix .

reviews.text: Hotel je prijemny, cisty, nijak luxusne vybavey, ale umisteny v centru, zamestnanci ochotni a mili. Za tu cenu velmi dobry

reviews.title: 3-star hotel review
reviews.text: Clean. Convenient. Comfortable bed. Cool air conditioning. The current price is reasonable for the location.

reviews.title: Yes and no
reviews.text: We first arrived at the hotel but the rooms didn't match the pictures. We asked for another room but they didn’t have any available. The personal then offered us to stay at another hotel (New Star Inn) where we would get free breakfast without any additional cost. We accepted and were not disappointed. The hotel we moved to was better and the personal was super nice. The breakfast was ok, nothing fancy but it filled you up. If you stay at this hotel don’t be afraid to complain if you are not satisfied because the staff will make sure you have a nice visit

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: It's my first time booking a hotel that I really like; usually, I'm just floating around. This time, I was able to check in early. The staff were very enthusiastic in assisting me.

reviews.title: Exceptional

reviews.title: Clean and quiet.

reviews.title: Everything is fine.
reviews.text: Everything is fine. The price, location, and service are all good, but there's a minor drawback: the water pressure in my room was a bit weak, and there were two instances of the electricity flickering, which made me feel scared because the fire alarm went off. Other than that, everything is okay. I will return every time I come back for work.

reviews.title: Simple mais un refresh serait le bienvenue
reviews.text:
Les chambres familiales du Tra My Hotel sont spacieuses, ce qui est appréciable, mais l’ensemble mériterait une rénovation. Les décors sont vieillots et certains équipements ne sont pas très pratiques : les placards sont si hauts qu’ils deviennent inutilisables, tandis que le frigo est trop petit pour une famille. L’un des matelas semblait très usé, je sentais les ressorts, mais comme nous passions peu de temps dans la chambre, cela restait supportable.

Côté salle de bain, la faible pression de l’eau chaude compliquait les douches, surtout pour les enfants. Enfin, le service en chambre fonctionne de manière originale : il faut le demander chaque jour à l’accueil, contrairement aux autres hôtels qui utilisent le système de carte à accrocher à la poignée. Une expérience mitigée dans l’ensemble.

reviews.title: 3 nuits en couple
reviews.text: Rapport qualité-prix ok. Dommages d'un ancien dégât d'eau visibles dans notre chambre. Photos et réalité concordent. Localisation parfaite: pas très loin du centre, mais dans le coeur de la vie authentique vietnamienne.

reviews.title: Perfect
reviews.text: Host is really welcoming, perfect location, thank you very much, my stay was perfect

reviews.title: schlechte Überraschung
reviews.text: Als wir in Tra My Hotel ankammen, steht unser bezahlt bestelltes Zimmer nicht zur Verfügung . Man hat uns zu einem anderen Hotel ( Diamond Hotel, ca.3 Km entfernt ) geschickt. Ich habe Tra My Hotel aufgesucht, weil meine Mutter in der Nähe wohnt, ich kann  jeden Tag zu Fuß zu ihr laufen. Am nächsten Tag haben wir den Chef des Hotels angerufen und er hat uns das Geld für 2 restliche Nächte zurückgegeben (natürlich mit Abzug).

reviews.title: Frechheit des Personals
reviews.text: Als meine Frau nach Toilettenpapier fragt,hat der Mitarbeiter des Hotels gesagt,dass wir jeden Tag nur eine Rolle Toilettenpapier kriegen, wenn wir mehr davon brauchen, müssen wir selbst anschaffen und wenn wir nicht zufrieden sind, sollen wir ein anderes Hotel aufsuchen.

reviews.title: 千万不要来
reviews.text: 太垃圾了，各位千万不要来。我早上到的很早，对方告诉我说现在酒店满房了，不能入住。要下午两点才可以。好的这样我理解，还没到入住时间，结果到了入住时间后再来，却又告诉我说现在房间坏了，只能为我更换另外一个酒店，并给我看了酒店的照片，我看了后还行。到了另外一个酒店，入住后发现房间特别的破，和图片完全不一样。各位千万小心。
